entry.title: Review: Taco Bell - Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla
entry.summary:
Taco Bell's Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla features grilled marinated steak, a three-cheese blend, new roasted poblano peppers, and Spicy Ranch, rolled up in a warm, flour tortilla.
It's available for $5.69 or as part of a $9 Discovery Luxe Cravings Box. I went with the box for the value. While Taco Bell calls the Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla a "reimagining" of a classic quesadilla, it's more like a large (for Taco Bell) steak-and-cheese grilled burrito. The new roasted poblano peppers held their own against the steak and cheese. While generally mild, a few bites were surprisingly spicy. They were cooked through but still retained some texture. Without the normal filler of rice, chips, and/or beans, the Rolled Quesadilla made for one of the meatiest and cheesiest Taco Bell burritos I can remember eating. The steak was tender and flavorful, and the cheese was nicely melted.
The Spicy Ranch added a little bit of heat and some acidity. While grilling the tortilla only retains some texture if you eat it on site, it adds a light toasty note. Overall, Taco Bell's Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla turned out really well. I really enjoyed the poblanos and the general meat-and-cheese quality of the burrito... er, rolled quesadilla. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla Calories - 530 Fat - 28g (Saturated Fat - 14g) Sodium - 1280mg Carbs - 43g (Sugar - 5g) Protein - 26g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Baskin-Robbins Brings Back Peppermint Ice Cream
entry.summary:
Baskin-Robbins brings back Peppermint ice cream as its Flavor of the Month for December 2025. The seasonal flavor is joined by the new Peppermint Fudge Cappy, Chocolate Fudge Cappy, and new Peppermint Avalanche Cake in a Box as Christmas fast approaches.
Additionally, the ice cream shop chain will be celebrating its 80th birthday on December 7, 2025, by offering 80-cent scoops of ice cream to Baskin-Robbins Rewards members at participating locations nationwide. The new Peppermint Fudge Cappy features Peppermint ice cream blended with coffee and fudge, topped with whipped cream, fudge, and peppermint candy pieces. The Chocolate Fudge Cappy consists of Chocolate ice cream blended with coffee and fudge, topped with whipped cream and a drizzle of fudge. The Peppermint Avalanche Cake in a Box features layers of chocolate cake, Peppermint ice cream, Oreo cookie crumbs, peppermint crunch candy bits, whipped frosting, and fudge. To round out the year, Baskin-Robbins Rewards members can get 31% off all scoops of ice cream on December 31, 2025, at participating locations. Photo via Baskin-Robbins. Read more at Brand Eating!

For a limited time, Dairy Queen is offering the Crispy Onion Cheeseburger Meal Deal for $7 at participating locations.
The meal includes a new Crispy Onion Cheeseburger, French fries, a 21-oz drink, and a small sundae. The new burger features a seasoned beef patty, crispy onion strings, melted sharp American cheese, ketchup, mayo, and pickles, served on a toasted bun. Dairy Queen continues to offer the long-running 3-piece Chicken Strip Meal Deal and Original Cheeseburger Meal Deal. Photo via Dairy Queen. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Tests New Mexican Pizza Empanadas
entry.summary:
Taco Bell gives savory empanadas another go with a limited-time test of new Mexican Pizza Empanadas at participating locations in the Phoenix, AZ area.
The crispy-fried empanadas are stuffed with seasoned ground beef, a three-cheese blend, and a "bold, zesty sauce." They are served with Mexican Pizza sauce for dipping. A 3-pack costs $3.49 to $4.49, depending on location. Select locations also offer a 6-pack for $5.99.
Mexican Pizza Empanadas are also featured in a $9 Discovery Luxe Cravings Box. The combo meal includes a 3-pack of Mexican Pizza Empanadas, Cinnamon Twists, a medium fountain drink, and either a Steak Burrito Supreme & Nacho Cheese Doritos Locos Taco or a Creamy Chipotle Crispy Chicken Soft Taco & Seasoned Beef Chalupa Supreme, depending on the location. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Panda Express Launches New Chocolate Bars Inspired by Its Dishes
entry.summary:
In celebration of National Comfort Food Day and the 2025 holiday season, Panda Express has partnered with luxury chocolatier Compartés to release a limited-edition collection of chocolate bars inspired by the chain's signature dishes.
As a promotion for the release, on December 5, 2025 (National Comfort Food Day), you can get a free Panda Express x Compartés Fortune Cookie Chocolate Bar with the purchase of any 2-item Panda Express Plate at participating locations, while supplies last. You can find a list of participating locations on the Panda Express website here. According to the terms, the freebie is "extremely limited." The Panda Express x Compartés chocolate bars include: - The Original Orange Bar - Creamy milk chocolate with zesty orange bits, a hint of red chili flakes, and crispy rice for crunch. - Honey Walnut Bar - White chocolate with candied walnuts, crisp honeycomb, and a touch of honey. - Fortune Cookie Bar - White chocolate with crushed Panda Express fortune cookies. There's a special fortune inside. - Kung Pao Bar - Dark chocolate with dried chili peppers, peanut bites, and flaky salt. In addition to the "free with purchase" promotion, all four chocolate bars are available for purchase from the Compartés online store for a limited time, while supplies last. They cost $11.95 each. A special gift box set that includes all four bars in special packaging is being sold for $49.95. Photo via Panda Express. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Krispy Kreme x Peanuts Donuts Arrive for 2025 Holiday Season
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme has teamed up with the Peanuts gang to launch the Krispy Kreme x Peanuts Collection of donuts for the 2025 holiday season.
The limited-time donuts include: - New Snoopy Cookies & Kreme Donut - A Snoopy-shaped donut filled with Cookies & Kreme filling, dipped in vanilla-flavored icing, and decorated with a Snoopy face. - New Charlie Brown Ornament Donut - A shell donut filled with brownie batter-flavored filling, dipped in yellow vanilla-flavored icing, and topped with a chocolate-flavored buttercreme zig-zag and ornament hook. - New Christmas Wreath Donut - An Original Glazed donut-topped with a buttercreme-flavored green swirl, yellow nonpareil sprinkles, and a Snoopy and Woodstock sugar piece. - Santa Belly Donut - A shell donut filled with White Kreme filling, decorated with a chocolate-flavored buttercreme Santa belt complete with a Santa buckle sugar piece. - Holiday Sprinkle Donut - An Original Glazed donut dipped in chocolate icing and festive sprinkles. This year's holiday donuts are available now at participating locations across the country. You can purchase them individually or by the dozen in a custom box. A six-pack of some of the donuts can also be found delivered fresh daily to select retailers. Krispy Kreme will also be celebrating its annual "Day of the Dozens" on December 12, 2025 (12/12) by offering a dozen Original Glazed donuts for $1 when you purchase any dozen donuts at the regular price. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Burger King Launches New SpongeBob Menu
entry.summary:
Burger King partners with the upcoming The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants to launch its new, limited-time SpongeBob Menu.
The new menu includes: -SpongeBob's Krabby Whopper ($8.29 near me) - A quarter-pound flame-grilled beef patty, served on a yellow square bun (the color comes from a spice) with American cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, onions, mayo, and ketchup (i.e., it's a regular Whopper with a yellow square bun for 30 cents more). - Mr. Krabs' Cheesy Bacon Tots ($2.89 for four near me) - Breaded and fried coin-shaped tots filled with gooey cheese, bacon bits, and potatoes. They're served in a SpongeBob-themed treasure chest carton. These seem very similar or identical to the Bacon Cheesy Tots that Burger King once offered, only with a SpongeBob treatment. - Patrick's S…

entry.title: Applebee's Introduces New Sizzlin' Cookie Dough Pie
entry.summary:
Applebee's adds the new Sizzlin' Cookie Dough Pie to its menu for the 2025 holiday season.
The new dessert is priced at $6.99 and features chocolate chip cookie dough served in a warm skillet, topped with vanilla ice cream and a caramel drizzle. Other Sizzlin' desserts offered by the casual dining chain include the Sizzlin' Caramel Apple Pie and Sizzlin' Butter Pecan Blondie. Also here for the holiday season are $6 Sleigh Bell Sips and Shake'N Up Your Holiday Cocktails. The Sleigh Bell Sips include: - $6 Tipsy Reindeer - A holiday punch featuring Smirnoff Vodka, Ocean Spray Cranberry, grenadine, and premium lemon sour, topped with a Santa gummy. - New $6 Sleigh All Day Rita - A margarita featuring Teremana Tequila Blanco, blue curaçao, melon liqueur, lime, and pineapple juice, topped with a Santa gummy. Shake’N Up Your Holiday Cocktails are served in a chilled shaker tin for multiple pours. They include: - New Espres-So Happy Martini - Tito's Handmade Vodka, Kahlúa and Owen's Nitro-Infused Espresso served with a Pocky Chocolate biscuit. - New Golden Goose - Grey Goose Vodka, triple sec, mango, and premium lemon sour. - New Perfect Cranberry Margarita - A margarita featuring 1800 Reposado Tequila, Grand Marnier, Cointreau, lime, and Ocean Spray Cranberry. Photo via Applebee's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Shake Shack Offers Free Big Shack with $10 Purchase Through December 7, 2025 and More
entry.summary:
Shake Shack is offering a series of deals throughout December, starting with a free Big Shack with a purchase of $10 or more through December 7, 2025.
The Big Shack (pictured) is the chain's latest limited-time burger. It's a riff on a Big Mac that features two quarter-pound Angus beef patties, secret sauce, green leaf lettuce, two slices of American cheese, Roma tomatoes, thick-cut pickles, and onions, on three buttered and toasted potato buns for $9.99 (which makes the deal essentially a BOGO). The free Big Shack deal is redeemable when placing an order, using the code "SHACKCHEER", at an in-restaurant kiosk, on the Shake Shack website, or on the Shake Shack mobile app. Other "free menu item with a $10 minimum purchase" deals coming up this month include:
12/8/25 to 12/14/25 - Free SmokeShack burger. 12/15/25 to 12/20/25 - Free Chicken Shack sandwich. 12/21/25 to 12/31/25 - Free ShackBurger.
The same code applies to all the deals. You can find other deals at Shake Shack on the "deals & specials" page. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Jack in the Box Reveals "24 Days of Jackmas" Deal Schedule
entry.summary:
The 24 Days of Jackmas promotion is back at Jack in the Box and features a different deal for each day of the week leading up to Christmas.
The promotion is exclusively for Jack Pack loyalty members, and here's what the lineup looks like:
Monday - Buy one, get one for $1 Breakfast Jack. Tuesday - Two Tacos for $0.99. Wednesday- Buy one, get one for $1 Jr. Chicken Sandwich. Thursday - Free Onion Rings with a $2 minimum order. Friday - Buy one, get one for $1 Jr. Cheeseburger. Saturday - Free 4-pc Chicken Nuggets with a $2 minimum order. Sunday - Buy one, get one 50% off Build Your Own Munchie Meal.
You can find the deals in the "offers" tab of the Jack in the Box mobile app. Photo via Jack in the Box. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Holiday Tree Cake and Sticky Toffee Pudding Through December 6, 2025
entry.summary:
Crumbl welcomes the 2025 holiday season with two new desserts for this week's lineup: the Holiday Tree Cake and Sticky Toffee Pudding.
Here's what the Crumbl dessert menu looks like for the week ending December 6, 2025: - New Holiday Tree Cake (pictured) - A square of vanilla sheet cake topped with a white drop buttercream, garland-inspired red stripes, and a sprinkle of green sugar crystals. - New Sticky Toffee Pudding - A warm brown sugar cake topped with a toffee glaze, a dollop of vanilla bean whipped cream, and a drizzle of toffee glaze. - Snickerdoodle Sandwich Cookie - Two chilled snickerdoodle cookies sandwiching a layer of vanilla cream cheese frosting, topped with a white drizzle and cinnamon sugar. - Sea Salt Toffee Skillet Cookie - A warm, gooey toffee cookie topped with a scoop of vanilla bean mousse, a drizzle of milk chocolate, a drizzle of caramel, crunchy toffee pieces, and flaky sea salt. - Brownie Batter Cookie - A warm chocolate cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chips and topped with brownie batter. - Raspberry Cheesecake Cookie - A chilled, buttery graham cracker cookie topped with vanilla cheesecake frosting and a tangy raspberry topping. - Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips. In addition to the pies, Crumbl offers a "Secret Menu" where each location selects a flavor to offer (including test flavors). You can find out what's available near you by checking the Crumbl mobile app or website. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Domino's Offers 50% Off Pizzas Through December 7, 2025
entry.summary:
Domino's is offering a limited-time deal where you can get 50% off the regular menu price of all pizzas ordered online through December 7, 2025.
The deal is a nice option if you prefer something other than the 1- and 2-topping pizza deals the pizza chain normally offers. For reference, here are the discounted prices for several popular pizza orders from my local Domino's in Los Angeles:
Large Cheese Pizza - $8.50 Large 1-Topping Pizza - $9.75 Large 2-Topping Pizza - $10.99 Large 3-Topping Pizza - $12.25 Large Specialty Pizza - $11.49 Medium, 1-Topping Handmade Pan Pizza - $8.99 Medium, 2-Topping Handmade Pan Pizza - $9.99 Medium, 3-Topping Handmade Pan Pizza - $10.99 Medium, 1-Topping Parmesan Stuffed Crust Pizza - $9.99

entry.title: Insomnia Cookies Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
entry.summary:
Insomnia Cookies bakes a trio of cookies for the 2025 holiday season. They include the new Holiday Munchie Mix, Salted Maple, and Jinglebread cookies.
Here's what you can expect from the cookies. - New Holiday Munchie Mix cookie - A war, brown sugar cookie packed with chocolate-covered pretzel bits, chocolate chunks, marshmallows and red and green M&M's. - Salted Maple cookie - A warm, maple brown sugar cookie with white creme and caramel chips, sprinkled with flaky salt. - Jinglebread cookie - A warm, gingerbread cookie sprinkled with sugar crystals. Prices vary, but the cookies go for $3.69 a piece here in Los Angeles. The chain will be adding to its holiday menu in early December with two more seasonal cookies. On National Cookie Day, December 4, 2025, the Snowball Classic cookie arrives. It's a sugar cookie stuffed with vanilla buttercream and topped with powdered sugar and edible glitter (to sparkle like snow). In celebration of the occasion, the first 100 Insomnia Rewards members who visit any participating US location will nab one Snowball Classic cookie for free. Then on December 9, 2025, the chain rolls out the Candy Cane Classic, a brown sugar cookie packed with peppermint pieces and white chips. Photo via Insomnia Cookies. Read more at Brand Eating!
